item.title: TronCarterNLU: Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 2h I would watch this every week from Si Woo and Manny. It’s 15 minutes of joy on the tour’
item.description:
Tron Carter @TronCarterNLU · 2h I would watch this every week from Si Woo and Manny. It’s 15 minutes of joy on the tour’s YT. Cita PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 17 abr. Mic’d up Si Woo Kim is pure entertainment
Everything you didn’t hear from Si Woo Kim in Chasing Sunday: Unheard, now on PGA TOUR YouTube. 2 3 170 46 mil

item.title: PGATOURComms: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 2h Hole locations for the final round of the RBC Heritage 1 7 40 10 mil
item.description: PGA TOUR Communications @PGATOURComms · 2h Hole locations for the final round of the RBC Heritage 1 7 40 10 mil

PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 2h Who is going to take home the @RBC_Heritage crown on Sunday?
(in partnership with @ROLEX ) 18 7 71 36 mil

item.title: grantboone: Josh Carpenter reposteó Grant Boone @grantboone · 2h 1 for the Money: JM Eagle CEO Walter Wang, who along with his wife
item.description: Josh Carpenter reposteó Grant Boone @grantboone · 2h 1 for the Money: JM Eagle CEO Walter Wang, who along with his wife and PlastPro CEO Shirley, just joined us on the @JMEagleLAChamp broadcast and announced a $1 million purse increase to $4.75m. It was $1.5m when they became title sponsors. 2 1 18 2 mil
